basic_details.job_title: RSSB Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 3540 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) has officially announced the Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 with 3540 openings. The detailed notification was published at the official website rssb.rajasthan.gov.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 21 to 40 years (age relaxation applicable as per category) and hold a Master’s Degree in the relevant subject with qualifications such as NET/SET/Ph.D. as per norms can now submit their online applications from 05 May 2026 to 03 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

application_fee.details: Fee to be paid online through SSO Portal / e-Mitra / CSC.

qualification.details: Educational Qualification: | Master’s Degree in the relevant subject with minimum required percentage as per UGC / State Government norms. NET / SET / Ph.D. qualification will be considered as per rules (details in notification). | Age Limit: | Nationality: Indian Citizen.

selection_process: Selection will be done as per Raj-CES Hiring of Man Power Rules 2023. It may include:
Screening of applications Written Examination / Shortlisting Document Verification
Detailed selection criteria will be notified later.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the SSO Portal.
Visit the official SSO Portal: http://sso.rajasthan.gov.in
Login with your SSO ID (or create new if not registered).
important_instructions: Read the full detailed advertisement carefully before filling the online application. Only online applications will be accepted. Upload clear scanned copies of all required documents. Keep your SSO ID, email ID, and mobile number active. No offline or manual applications will be entertained. Candidates are advised to apply well before the last date to avoid last-minute technical issues. Regularly visit the official RSSB website for updates on exam date, admit card, and result.
